rulings.Case Title: 2046 FILBERT, LLC VS. PEGGY BARTEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pacific Union International, Inc. And John Kirkpatrick?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff?S First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANTS PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC. AND JOHN KIRKPATRICK'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and moot in part. Motion is moot as to consequential and incidental damages; withdrawn. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to the request for pre-judgment interest to allege facts supporting this request. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to the request for attorney's fees; no opposition filed. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW PAUL KANGAS VS. ESTATE OF CHRISTINA Y.C. CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2022 line 6. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by the motion.
